ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., university, department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session in which the action occurred */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the page visited or action taken */,
  "context_type" TEXT /* Type of context (e.g., course, user, account) */,
  "controller" TEXT /* Controller handling the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., page view, link click) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action in which the link was clicked */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link clicked */,
  "link_text" TEXT /* Text of the link clicked */,
  "link_target" TEXT /* Target of the link (e.g., _blank, _self) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_links_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES user_actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the user is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the asset belongs */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., video, document) */,
  "asset_url" TEXT /* URL of the asset */,
  "asset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the asset in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assets_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_contexts" (
  "action_context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action context */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action in the context */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* ID of the context */,
  "context_type" TEXT /* Type of context (e.g., course, account) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_contexts_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES user_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_contexts_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES user_contexts ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

Number of credits for the course
